title: Is it possible to Customize Kanban View

posts.author: dinithij (Din Jaz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

I wanted to know whether it’s possible to write code and customize the current Kanban View?
My requirement is to display conversations on the card itself without click on the conversation icon on the top right corner of the card. Just wanted to know whether it’s possible to write a monday.com app on top of current Kanban View with this requirement.

Thanks
Dinithi

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @dinithij - the customizable options on the Kanban view right now would be to either filter the view, or change the options within the settings view:

It wouldn’t be possible to write code to customize our default Kanban view however it is possible to either write an app to have a new board view, or browse through the app marketplace for alternatives.

-Daniel

posts.author: dinithij (Din Jaz)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you. I will try to go with my own app.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
